title: 宝塚記念の後に・春のグランプリ制覇！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan claims victory at the Takarazuka
Kinen and shouts her joy out to the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen congratulates and entrusts her
with competing in medium-distance races for the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She also expresses a desire for Ryan to become
an exquisite lady by the time of their next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Becoming a proper lady by the year-end Arima
Kinen means Mejiro Ryan will be as busy as ever.
